payload.answer: I can’t inspect mem_123 because the memory contents and metadata were not included in the provided input.

entity_resolution.reason: The request references memory id mem_123, but no memory record or inspection data was provided in the input to evaluate.

details: No current facts were inferred from the missing memory record.
Ambiguity preserved: mem_123 may exist, be deleted, superseded, or be inaccessible.

repair_options: Provide the stored memory record for mem_123, including statement, status, timestamps, source, and any supersession/deletion metadata.
If mem_123 was deleted or superseded, provide the audit trail so it can be reported without presenting it as current.
